ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the county is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "area_sq_mi" REAL /* Area of the county in square miles */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the county */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the county was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the county information was last updated */,
  "geo_location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the county (latitude and longitude) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_types" (
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime type */,
  "crime_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the crime type (e.g., Violent Crime, Property Crime) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crime type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the crime type was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the crime type information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_subtypes" (
  "crime_subtype_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime subtype */,
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime type the subtype belongs to */,
  "crime_subtype_name" TEXT /* Name of the crime subtype (e.g., Murder, Robbery, Burglary) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crime subtype */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the crime subtype was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the crime subtype information was last updated */,
  "parent_crime_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent crime type (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_subtype_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_subtypes_parent_crime_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_crime_type_id") REFERENCES crime_types ("crime_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime statistic entry */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county where the crime occurred */,
  "crime_subtype_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime subtype */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the crime statistic */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the crime statistic */,
  "crime_count" INTEGER /* Number of crimes of this subtype in the given county and time period */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the crime statistic was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the crime statistic information was last updated */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source that provided the crime statistic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_statistics_crime_subtype_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_subtype_id") REFERENCES crime_subtypes ("crime_subtype_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_statistics_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime report */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county where the crime occurred */,
  "crime_subtype_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime subtype */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the crime report */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the crime */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crime incident */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the investigation (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officer who filed the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the crime report was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the crime report information was last updated */,
  "incident_date" TEXT /* Date of the crime incident */,
  "victim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the victim (if applicable) */,
  "suspect_id" INTEGER /* ID of the suspect (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_reports_suspect_id FOREIGN KEY ("suspect_id") REFERENCES suspects ("suspect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_reports_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("officer_id") REFERENCES officers ("officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_reports_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_reports_victim_id FOREIGN KEY ("victim_id") REFERENCES victims ("victim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_reports_crime_subtype_id FOREIGN KEY ("crime_subtype_id") REFERENCES crime_subtypes ("crime_subtype_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each officer */,
  "officer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the officer */,
  "badge_number" TEXT /* Badge number of the officer */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the officer belongs to */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the officer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the officer was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the officer information was last updated */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supervisor (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., officer, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user information was last updated */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime report being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES crime_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., local police department, state database) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source information was last updated */,
  "data_quality_rating" TEXT /* Data quality rating of the data source (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "victims" (
  "victim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each victim */,
  "victim_name" TEXT /* Full name of the victim */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the victim */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the victim */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the victim */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the victim was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the victim information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("victim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suspects" (
  "suspect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each suspect */,
  "suspect_name" TEXT /* Full name of the suspect */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the suspect */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the suspect */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the suspect */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the suspect was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the suspect information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suspect_id")
)
